content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 6

   - So we will start recognising from Jan’26 onwards?

- On shift of recognition at Import market >> What is the delta at each
   country level for previous submission vs new submission?

Slide12

   - For CNSIP under Swamp, where is the P&L being recognised right now?
- When will we bring it under CNSIP?

- For the changes we wanted to make for Swamp SIP, where did we land on
   it in the end?

Slide 20

   - Is this not a lane by lane analysis?

Every lane would have their own
   issues?
So we will know how small/big CNSIP needs to be in each market?

Slide 39

   - @Keljin Chua <keljin.chua@shopee.com> so this is aligned with you?
MYSG will not be owned by SG?

Slide 42

   - Hard to read this slide in general, how does seller setup go down MOM?
Is it total or paid ads?
